2603.27277.title: Codebase-Memory: Tree-Sitter-Based Knowledge Graphs for LLM Code Exploration via MCP
2603.27277.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM) coding agents typically explore codebases through repeated file-reading and grep-searching, consuming thousands of tokens per query without structural understanding. We present Codebase-Memory, an open-source system that constructs a persistent, Tree-Sitter-based knowledge graph via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), parsing 66 languages through a multi-phase pipeline with parallel worker pools, call-graph traversal, impact analysis, and community discovery. Evaluated across 31 real-world repositories, Codebase-Memory achieves 83% answer quality versus 92% for a file-exploration agent, at ten times fewer tokens and 2.1 times fewer tool calls. For graph-native queries such as hub detection and caller ranking, it matches or exceeds the explorer on 19 of 31 languages.
2603.27277.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）編碼代理通常通過重複的文件閱讀和grep搜索來探索代碼庫，每次查詢消耗數千個標記，卻沒有結構性理解。我們提出了Codebase-Memory，一個開源系統，通過模型上下文協議（MCP）構建持久的基於Tree-Sitter的知識圖譜，通過多階段管道解析66種語言，並配備平行工作池、調用圖遍歷、影響分析和社群發現。在31個現實世界的代碼庫中進行評估，Codebase-Memory的答案質量達到83%，而文件探索代理為92%，所需的標記數量少了十倍，工具調用次數少了2.1倍。對於圖形原生查詢，例如樞紐檢測和調用者排名，它在31種語言中的19種上達到或超過了探索者的表現。
2603.27277.author: Martin Vogel et.al.
2603.27277.authors: Martin Vogel, Falk Meyer-Eschenbach, Severin Kohler, Elias Grünewald, Felix Balzer
